description: DaVinci AI Brand DNA - monochrome editorial design system for luxury narrative, premium decks, and product storytelling
effects: Editorial monochrome panels with deep black canvas
Soft spotlight gradients in white and graphite
Large typographic contrast with generous whitespace
Slow fade and reveal motion instead of technical UI noise

PhaseCard.description: Represents a project phase or milestone
PhaseCard.structure: p-6 rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-md hover:border-white/25 transition-all duration-300

content.title: text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-stone-100
content.status_dot: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-stone-100 or bg-stone-500

InsightCard.structure: p-6 rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/[0.05] to-white/[0.01] backdrop-blur-md

content.title: text-base font-semibold text-stone-100 tracking-tight
content.tag: inline-block px-3 py-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.22em] text-stone-200 border border-white/15 rounded-full

StatBox.structure: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 rounded-[32px] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.035] backdrop-blur-md

PersonaCard.structure: p-6 rounded-[28px] border border-white/10 bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-md

content.avatar: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-stone-100 to-stone-500 mb-4
content.name: text-xl font-semibold text-stone-100 tracking-tight
content.pain_points: ul list-disc ml-4 text-stone-300/72 text-sm mt-3
content.quote: italic text-stone-300/66 border-l border-white/15 pl-4 mt-4

TechStack.item: px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono text-white/80 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full

VisionBlock.structure: relative p-8 rounded-[32px] border border-white/12 bg-gradient-to-br from-white/[0.07] to-transparent backdrop-blur-md overflow-hidden
VisionBlock.decorative: absolute -top-10 -right-10 w-40 h-40 bg-white/10 rounded-full blur-3xl

layout_patterns.Hero-Statement: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] text-center

borders.gradient: border border-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-white/50 to-transparent bg-clip-border

animations.slide_up: transition-transform duration-500 ease-out translate-y-4 to translate-y-0
